dc:title: PLOS Medicine - Stratified Open-Access Sample Corpus (2016-2025)
dc:creator: Lakens, Daniel
dc:subject: medicine
open access
natural language processing
AI validation
text mining
dc:description: A stratified random sample of 1,000 open-access articles published in PLOS Medicine (2016-2025, 100 per year), converted to metacheck paperlist objects for validation of AI and text-mining tools. DOIs were verified against the original CrossRef sample rather than relying solely on GROBID's header extraction, which was unreliable for a small number of articles.
dc:rights: CC-BY 4.0 or CC0, depending on the article (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/, https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/)

dc:provenance.pdf_source: Unpaywall API, with PLOS direct-download fallback
dc:provenance.doi_matching: Verified against original CrossRef sample DOI (2026-06-19)
